Borel transform constructed at dps=300 in scaled u=t/zeta_star coords; b_n(u) := a_n * zeta_star^n / Gamma(n+1) with n in 0..60. Computed for V_quad/QL15/QL05/QL09. |b_5| ranges 0.78-5.81; |b_20| ranges 0.10-0.94; |b_40| ranges 0.04-0.50 across reps -- consistent with finite radius of convergence at u=1 (leading Stokes singularity).

Pade [N/M] sweep complete for all four reps at dps=300 over N,M in {6,8,10,12,14,16,18}: 49/49 OK Pade approximants per rep (no RANK_LOSS, no NO_POLE_NEAR_2 failures). Pade nearest-pole-to-u=2 distance ranges from min 0.005 (QL15 [16,14]) to max 0.82 (QL15 [8,6]) across the grid -- never converging tightly to u=2.

Convergence-region detection: 0/84 adjacent (N,M) pairs achieve digits-of-agreement >= dps/4 = 75 across all four reps. Best agreements per rep: V_quad 3.741 digits, QL15 3.342 digits, QL05 ~3 digits, QL09 ~3 digits. No EXTRACTED region exists at this Pade order with raw-series methodology.

Median |S_2 candidate| per rep: V_quad 11.02 (cf T35 S_1_imag 51.07; ratio 0.216); QL15 70.63 (cf 134.36; ratio 0.526); QL05 9.62 (cf 8.82; ratio 1.091); QL09 48.87 (cf -38.17; |ratio| 1.281). Absence of a consistent S_2/S_1 ratio across reps further substantiates PERMANENT_RESIDUAL classification.

M8b axis verdict: M8b_S2_PERMANENT_RESIDUAL_VIA_BOREL_PADE. All four reps classify as PERMANENT_RESIDUAL_G6b under the relay 092 spec gate (digits-of-agreement >= dps/4). Resolves M8b axis via closure-by-residual-acceptance per Phase D2.

Comparison to 017L (T37E) LSQ baseline: T37E reported D_extraction infeasibility with rel half-range ~10^217 across stability grid. The present 092 Borel-Pade attempt shows a far tighter spread (rel half-range 2.14 to 76.85 across reps) but still no consistent S_2 value. Padé absence-of-convergence is a strictly stronger negative-result substrate than LSQ envelope-spanning-zero, because the Pade construction is well-conditioned at small (N,M) (no RANK_LOSS, no overdetermined system).

T35 constants used at dps=250: V_quad zeta_star=2.30940107676 / S1_imag=51.06556313995466; QL15 zeta_star=2.30940107676 / S1_imag=134.36042939796076; QL05 zeta_star=4.0 / S1_imag=8.81707334998; QL09 zeta_star=2.82842712475 / S1_imag=-38.16859185. Loaded from T35 stokes_multipliers_per_rep.csv.

Pade-divergence pattern (Phase D2 evidence) per rep: V_quad |S_2| span 6.20-29.79 (4.8x), monotone-decrease at fixed M=18 in N, sign-coherent positive Im(S_2)=0 across all 49 cells (Pade has real coeffs by construction). QL15 |S_2| span 23.6-297.9 (12.6x), non-monotonic. QL05 |S_2| span 0.012-933 (~78000x). QL09 |S_2| span 1.95-491 (~252x). All four reps show non-monotonic divergence patterns inconsistent with single-singularity log-clustering toward u=2.

Borel singularity inventory (Phase E F-1 suggested): Pade poles for V_quad cluster mostly in radius 0.4-0.7 from u=2; for QL15 radius 0.005-0.7; for QL05 radius spans wider (some poles approach u=2 at small (N,M) sweep but residues do not stabilise); for QL09 radius 0.1-0.4.
